queries.question: What are the minimum and preferred years of experience for the open position with the greatest salary?
queries.sql:
SELECT Minimum_Years, Preferred_Years
FROM Jobs
ORDER BY Salary DESC
LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?minimum_years ?preferred_years WHERE {
  ?jobs a :Jobs .
  ?jobs p:Minimum_Years ?minimum_years .
  ?jobs p:Preferred_Years ?preferred_years .
  ?jobs p:Salary ?salary_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?salary_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: What are the preferred years of experience for the open position with the greatest salary?
queries.sql:
